name: ai-update-agent
description: Daily India news digest agent that sends a top-10 morning summary to a WhatsApp group at 6:00 AM IST.

agent_metadata.domain: news digest / market and public affairs briefing
agent_metadata.primary_users: WhatsApp group members who want a daily India news briefing
agent_metadata.schedule_description: Every day at 6:00 AM IST, summarize the prior 24 hours of India news and post it to WhatsApp.
